<!-- walkthrough_start -->

## Walkthrough

This pull request introduces a complete XP calculation engine for the CodeRabbit/Codogotchi platform. The implementation defines per-signal XP rates (for Claude tokens, Codex tokens, GitHub PRs, and Wakatime hours), a stage-threshold table spanning stages 1–5, and type contracts for raw activity signals and computed XP totals. Core functions convert each signal type independently with floor-to-integer precision, aggregate multi-source contributions into a total XP value, and determine player stage by matching total XP against threshold boundaries. The package entrypoint is updated to export the new XP module. Comprehensive test coverage validates conversion linearity, negative-input handling, multi-source aggregation isolation, total monotonicity, and stage boundary correctness. Configuration and metadata artifacts document prior AI review runs.

<!-- walkthrough_end -->
<!-- tips_start -->
